## Problem or use case

What technical audit problem would this feature help solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the new check, CLI option, workflow, template, or documentation change.

## Example input or scenario

Use synthetic or anonymized examples only.

Example:

## Expected output

What should the tool or documentation produce?

## Scope and responsible-use notes

Explain whether the feature remains focused on neutral technical clarification and reproducibility.
